name: Fried Won-Tons
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok, cook ground beef and pork over medium heat until browned.
2. Add carrots and onion; cook until vegetables are tender.
3. Stir in bok choy, onion, bean sprouts, soy sauce, sugar, and cornstarch mixture (made with rice wine and cold water).
4. Season with pepper and green onions.
5. Assemble won-ton wrappers by placing a teaspoon of filling in the center, moistening edges, folding corners to seal, and sealing completely.
6. Place assembled wontons on a plate covered with a damp towel to prevent drying.
7. Fry wontons in hot oil until lightly browned on each side.
8. Drain and serve.
